name: boltund
flavor_text: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: tail-whip
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: bite
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: electrify
moves.effect: Changes the target’s move’s type to electric if it hasn’t moved yet this turn.

moves.name: nuzzle
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: roar
moves.effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

moves.name: spark
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: charge
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: bulk-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: charm
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: crunch
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: dig
moves.effect: User digs underground, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: eerie-impulse
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: electric-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

moves.name: electro-ball
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user has greater Speed than the target, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fire-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: focus-energy
moves.effect: Increases the user’s chance to score a critical hit.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: hyper-voice
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: play-rough
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psychic-fangs
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: snarl
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

moves.name: volt-switch
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: wild-charge
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: rising-voltage
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

abilitiesDetailed.name: strong-jaw
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.

abilitiesDetailed.name: competitive
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
